scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @frsh/api && npm run build -w @frsh/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @frsh/api && npm run lint -w @frsh/admin
scripts.db:deploy: prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 20260715130000_unique_user_phone --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; prisma migrate deploy --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
